## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, reporting, and operational changes.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**FAQ Schema Fix:** GrowthX is manually adding missing FAQ schema to recent articles, a temporary fix until engineering automates the process.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Reporting Delay:** December's performance report is delayed but will be sent async. Its data is expected to be low-signal due to typical B2B holiday traffic patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Cadence Shift:** Meetings will move to a bi-weekly cadence to focus on strategy and performance. Project management updates will now be sent asynchronously via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking Gap:** Jason identified a critical gap in Webflow conversion tracking (GA) and will investigate if existing Mixpanel data can fill it.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

## Topics

### Content & Reporting

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 5 articles are queued for delivery this week.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**FAQ Schema Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Problem:** Recent articles are missing FAQ schema, preventing the content from appearing in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Cause:** A new, manual process for generating and adding the schema was missed during publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX is manually updating all affected articles.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Automation:** Engineering is working to automate this step by connecting the content pipeline directly to the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**December Performance Report:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Status:** Delayed; Bailey will send it async tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Insight:** December is a low-signal month for B2B traffic, making the data less actionable for strategic decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**2026 Goals Planning Session:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Align content strategy with Otto's 2026 goals and KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Timing:** To be scheduled in \~2 weeks to allow for internal goal-setting and to ensure Michael can attend.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**New Cadence:** Bi-weekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Shift focus from project management to higher-level strategy, performance analysis, and conversion optimization as the blog matures.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**Asynchronous Updates:** Project management details will be sent via Slack every Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Conversion Tracking Gap

  - [**Problem:** No end-to-end conversion tracking exists for the Webflow marketing site (GA), preventing attribution of sign-ups/logins to content sources.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [**App Tracking:** The main app (`app.ottotheagent.com`) is tracked correctly in Mixpanel.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [**Site Tracking:** The marketing site uses Google Analytics (GA).](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Jason will work with the original GA contractor to implement tracking, likely via Google Tag Manager (GTM).](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Potential Solution:** Investigate if Mixpanel, which tracks the entire domain, already captures the missing conversion data.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:** GrowthX can provide best practices or connect Jason with an internal expert if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Deliver 5 articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Send December performance report async tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Schedule 2026 planning session for \~2 weeks out.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Investigate if Mixpanel already captures Webflow conversion data.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
      - [Coordinate with the GA contractor to implement missing tracking via GTM.](https://fathom.video/share/d7TZN6z7Uq4zyWsHHDvCmCx2adP_wS7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
